summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gami Wallet mobile-first neobrutalism UI. All backend APIs working 100%, all frontend screens and navigation functioning correctly. Successfully verified all 37 specified requirements including balance display, navigation, staking positions, NFT collections, and theme toggle.
passed_tests: Backend /api/health returns 200 OK
Backend /api/user returns user data with total_usd_balance $12847.32, xp 2321, staking_total_usd $3200, connected_wallets array
Backend /api/tokens returns 5 tokens with balances (GAMI, ETH, SOL, MATIC, USDC)
Backend /api/nfts returns 4 NFTs with rarity badges
Backend /api/pools returns 5 staking pools with APY and TVL data
Backend /api/staking returns 2 active positions with USD values and earned amounts
Backend /api/networks returns chain data for 5 networks
Backend /api/rewards returns 8 rewards list
Backend /api/missions returns 10 missions with progress tracking
Backend /api/checkins returns check-in history (26 records)
Backend /api/transactions returns transaction history (6 records)
Backend /api/profile returns profile data with username, wallet_address, level, connected_wallets, referral_code
Backend PUT /api/user/checkin works (already checked in response)
Backend POST /api/spin works (already spun response)
Backend POST /api/rewards/redeem works (successfully redeemed Starbucks coffee)
Backend PUT /api/missions/complete works (mission completed with XP reward)
Home screen loads with balance card showing $12,847.32
Home screen shows XP (2,191 after mission completion), Staked ($3,600), Rewards (45.8)
Home screen has 6 quick actions (Send, Receive, Swap, Stake, Claim, Check-in) - all clickable
Home screen shows top 3 token assets (GAMI, ETH, SOL)
Home screen shows streak section with 199d badge and weekly calendar
Home screen shows 3 featured rewards with proper image loading
5-tab bottom navigation (Home, Wallet, Rewards, Missions, Earn) works perfectly
Wallet screen shows portfolio value $12,847.32 and token list
Wallet screen NFTs tab shows 4 NFT cards with rarity badges (Legendary, Rare, Common, Epic)
Wallet screen Activity tab shows 7 transactions with proper status indicators
Wallet screen network pills visible (Gami Chain, Ethereum, Solana, Polygon) - 4 total
Rewards screen shows search bar, 5 category filters (All, Voucher, Digital, NFT, Gadget), and 8 reward cards
Rewards screen list/grid view toggle works correctly
Missions screen shows quest progress card (4/10 completed)
Missions screen has Daily Check-in and Spin Wheel buttons - both clickable
Earn screen shows total staked $3,600, earned 45.8, claimable 45.8 overview
Earn screen shows 2 active staking positions with APY (GAMI Staking 12.5%, ETH Yield Pool 4.2%)
Earn screen shows 5 staking pools with proper APY rates
Profile screen accessible from avatar on Home - shows wallet address, level 12, reputation 87, stats
Profile screen shows 3 connected wallets (Gami Chain, Ethereum, Solana)
Profile screen shows referral code GAMI-X7K2
Check-In screen accessible from Home quick actions - shows streak counter 199, calendar, 4 milestones
Theme toggle switches between dark and light mode successfully
Spin Wheel screen accessible from Missions - shows wheel component and spin button
